title: Cozy Chilli Quinoa Bake
description: A savory, crumbly Ethiopian-inspired dish featuring quinoa and a blend of spicy chilli flakes in a plant-based-friendly recipe.

ingredients.name: Pinch of cayenne pepper or to taste

instructions: Rinse quinoa in a fine mesh strainer. Soak it with water or vegetable broth overnight.
Drain and rinse again, then add to a pot with twice its volume of water or broth. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer until all water is absorbed (about 15 minutes).
In a large skillet, sauté chopped onion and minced garlic until soft.
Add diced bell pepper, cook for another minute.
Stir in cooked quinoa and the spinach or kale. Mix well.
Pour in lemon juice and tomatoes. Stir to combine all ingredients evenly, then add plant-based milk or water. Season with salt and cayenne pepper.
Simmer for an additional 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Transfer to a baking dish. Sprinkle chilli flakes on top if desired. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 20-25 minutes until bubbly and golden brown.
Serve hot as a side or main course with your favorite dipping sauce.
